zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Quartermain於1338年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾諾斯 韋斯頓時，他的父親Thomas Quartermain25歲，母親Katherine Bretton21歲。他於1377年與Joan Russell在英國英格蘭奧可福爾諾斯 韋斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1397年5月6日在英國奧可福爾利可特享年59歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Quartermain于1338年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾諾斯 韋斯頓时，他的父亲Thomas Quartermain25岁，母亲Katherine Bretton21岁。他于1377年与Joan Russell在英国英格兰奧可福爾諾斯 韋斯頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1397年5月6日在英国奧可福爾利可特享年59岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾坦。

nameMeanings.name: Quartermain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Quarterman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Germaine, Marcel, Pascal.

English (Oxfordshire and Surrey): nickname from Anglo-Norman French quatre mayns, quatre mans ‘four hands’, which has been taken to imply ‘mail-fisted’ but was perhaps used of a skilled craftsman or a dextrous juggler or conjuror.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Quartermain was born in 1338, in North Weston, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Quartermain, was 25 and his mother, Katherine Bretton, was 21. He married Joan Russell in 1377, in North Weston, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 6 May 1397, in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Thame, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Quartermain est né en 1338, à North Weston, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Quartermain, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Katherine Bretton, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joan Russell en 1377, à North Weston, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 mai 1397, à Rycote, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Thame, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Quartermain 1338 in North Weston, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Quartermain 25 und seine Mutter Katherine Bretton 21. Er hat 1377 in North Weston, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Russell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Mai 1397 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Thame, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Quartermainが1338年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアノース ウエストンで生まれた時，父Thomas Quartermainは25歳，母Katherine Brettonは21歳であった。1377年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアノース ウエストンでJoan Russellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1397年5月6日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアリコトで59歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアサムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Quartermain(이)가 1338년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 노르스 웨스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Quartermain(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Bretton(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1377년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 노르스 웨스턴에서 Joan Russell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1397년 5월 6일 영국 스퍼드실르 리컷에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 섬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Quartermain nasceu em 1338, em North Weston, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Quartermain, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Bretton, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Russell em 1377, em North Weston, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Quartermain родился в 1338 г. в местности норт вестон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Quartermain было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Bretton, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Russell в 1377 г. в местности норт вестон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 мая 1397 г. в местности рикот, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности там, оксфордшир, Англия.
